title: RecommendationObject
description: A governed, replayable proposed action over marketing/prospecting/SEO surfaces: binds evidence to an action with explicit risk, guardrails, rollback, and validation, and chains into the reasoning-evidence fabric so every actuation is auditable. Cannot actuate without an autonomy admission receipt.

id.description: Stable URN identifier for this recommendation object.

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the contract this document conforms to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the recommendation object was created.

title.description: Short human-readable summary of the proposed action.

scope.description: Which properties, surfaces, and audience tags this recommendation affects.

surfaces.description: Surface identifiers (e.g. ServiceManifest surface URNs) in scope.

evidence.description: Windowed metrics, bias-corrected estimates, and audit findings that justify the action (e.g. site-audit buckets, backlink toxicity, curvature findings).

action.description: The proposed change to a control surface (e.g. publish file, shift budget, disavow domain, adjust exploration entropy).

risk.description: Risk-rubric scores (0=none .. 3=severe) bounding the action against the persuasion-machine and compliance risks.

outcomeQuality.description: Risk of high engagement but low downstream value.

guardrails.description: Hard constraints enforced during execution (e.g. spend caps, frequency caps, blocklists).

rollback.description: How to safely undo the action (e.g. revert-to prior config hash).

validation.description: Experiment design and success metrics used to validate the action's effect.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the recommendation object.

autonomyLevel.description: Autonomy ladder level (L0-L5) required to actuate this recommendation.

admissionReceiptRef.description: URN of the autonomy admission receipt that authorized actuation; null until admitted. Actuation is fail-closed without it.

runRef.description: Optional reference to the reasoning run that produced this recommendation.

receiptRef.description: Optional reference to the reasoning receipt emitted on actuation.

replayClass.description: Replay fidelity class for the action, matching the reasoning-evidence fabric.

traceHash.description: Hash of the serialized recommendation object plus prior digest, for forensic hash-chaining onto the evidence spine.
